title: Problem implementing a counter example from Xilinx using Yosys + ISE

features.name: async load in multi-edge always block
features.description: Code should include an always block with sensitivity list containing multiple edge-triggered events (posedge clk or posedge async_sig) where async signal controls a conditional load
features.snippet: always @(posedge C or posedge ALOAD) begin if (ALOAD) tmp <= D; else tmp <= tmp + 1'b1; end

features.name: synth_xilinx -ise EDIF output generating unsupported cell types
features.description: Code should include synthesis targeting synth_xilinx -ise that produces EDIF output with internal cell types like $_DFFSR_PPP_ which are not resolvable by Xilinx ISE ngdbuild
features.snippet: yosys -Q -p "read_verilog counter.v; synth_xilinx -top counter -family xc7 -ise; write_edif -pvector bra yosys.edif"

features.name: 4-bit counter with async load and increment
features.description: Code should include a 4-bit counter register with asynchronous load capability where the load and increment operations are mutually exclusive in an if-else structure
features.snippet: input [3:0] D; reg [3:0] tmp; always @(posedge C or posedge ALOAD) begin if (ALOAD) tmp <= D; else tmp <= tmp + 1'b1; end assign Q = tmp;
